content: @Miguel Ojeda would it be possible to allow members to manage issue/PR labels without giving push access? It seems that GitHub has a "Triage" role that allows this.
So far Alex and I have been taking care of that since there are not many issues, but if you want to help, sure!
Is it okay to add prio: low to some of my PRs, like what we discussed in the meeting?
I have avoided labeling PRs at all so far, but if you wish :)
